assumptions: Activation chance 20% per each round.

effects: Known possible overlap windows: Round 3 after a successful Round 2 application; Round 3 from a successful Round 3 application only if Blazing Fury resolves before Infernal Burst that round; Round 6 after a successful Round 5 application; Round 6 from a successful Round 6 application only if Blazing Fury resolves before Infernal Burst that round; Round 9 after a successful Round 8 application; Round 9 from a successful Round 9 application only if Blazing Fury resolves before Infernal Burst that round.
Caraxes is the resolved recipient of First-Strike if the supplier activates.
Infernal Burst benefits while Caraxes has First-Strike.
Action order within same-round overlap is unresolved.
exactResultUnknownReason: Exact First-Strike prerequisite enablement cannot be calculated because supplier application success, dependent activation success, same-target overlap, same-round action order, roll scope, and final branch outcomes are unresolved.
explanation: Blazing Fury has a 20% chance each round to grant First-Strike to one ally in any lane. First-Strike lasts 2 rounds. On Rounds 3, 6, and 9, Infernal Burst deals Fire Damage at a 100% rate to all qualifying enemies in any lane, up to 3. When Caraxes has First-Strike, the rate increases 1.5x to 150%. Blazing Fury's First-Strike can overlap Infernal Burst in these windows: Round 3 after a successful Round 2 application; Round 3 from a successful Round 3 application only if Blazing Fury resolves before Infernal Burst that round; Round 6 after a successful Round 5 application; Round 6 from a successful Round 6 application only if Blazing Fury resolves before Infernal Burst that round; Round 9 after a successful Round 8 application; Round 9 from a successful Round 9 application only if Blazing Fury resolves before Infernal Burst that round. Caraxes is the resolved recipient of First-Strike if the supplier activates; Infernal Burst benefits while Caraxes has First-Strike. Activation and uptime remain unresolved. Same-round action order is unresolved.
